title: VR-MERGE Payout Payload
description: 50/50 split payout payload executed on the 15th of each month for the prior month's revenue. Validated server-side via Ajv before /api/payout/payload accepts the request.

artist_id.description: ULID of the artist record. Format: art_<26-char-ULID>.

period.description: Revenue period being paid out, in YYYY-MM format. Always the calendar month BEFORE scheduled_for.

gross_revenue.description: Total revenue collected for this artist in the period (USD). Two-decimal precision.

label_share.description: Label's 50% cut. MUST equal gross_revenue / 2 (rounded to cents). Server enforces label_share + artist_share === gross_revenue.

artist_share.description: Artist's 50% cut. MUST equal gross_revenue / 2 (rounded to cents). This is the amount actually transmitted to recipient_email_or_acct.

payout_method.description: Channel through which the artist_share is transmitted.

recipient_email_or_acct.description: If payout_method=paypal: RFC5322 email tied to the artist's PayPal account. If payout_method=bank: opaque account reference (tokenized via banking partner; never raw account/routing).

scheduled_for.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the payout will be (or was) executed. MUST be the 15th of a month at 09:00 UTC. Cron 'POST /api/payout/payload' batch fires at this moment.

status.description: Lifecycle state of this payout record.

dry_run.description: When true, payload is validated and logged but no actual transfer is initiated. Defaults to false.

paypal_batch_id.description: PayPal Payouts API batch ID, populated after successful execution.

bank_transfer_ref.description: Banking partner transfer reference, populated after successful execution when payout_method=bank.

executed_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when execution actually completed. Null until status=executed.

notes.description: Optional admin note attached to this payout (e.g. correction reason).

allOf.description: PayPal recipient must be a valid email.
Bank recipient must be a tokenized account reference (acct_<token>).
